enriched_points.expanded_content: Allocate funding for innovative geothermal energy projects through DOE and NSF grants, fostering advancements in technology and reducing costs for sustainable energy solutions.
Advocate for legislation that promotes geothermal energy development, including tax incentives and streamlined permitting processes to enhance project feasibility and community engagement.
Involve local populations in geothermal initiatives by organizing educational programs and public forums to raise awareness of benefits and foster community support.
